zh.lifeSummary: Sohier de Bailleul Chevalier是Baudouin de Bailleul Sgr Douxlieu的兒子，出生。他於1346年之前與Isabeau de Ghistelles在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sohier de Bailleul Chevalier是Baudouin de Bailleul Sgr Douxlieu的儿子，出生。他于1346年之前与Isabeau de Ghistelles在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sohier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Sohl
meanings: From the vocabulary word sol ‘sun’ (Latin sol). This was a common given name in the Middle Ages, being borne, for example, by one of the daughters of El Cid , and it is still in use today; in part it may now be taken as a short form of Soledad .

en.lifeSummary: Sohier de Bailleul Chevalier was born as the son of Baudouin de Bailleul Sgr Douxlieu. He married Isabeau de Ghistelles before 1346, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Sohier de Bailleul Chevalier est né, fils de Baudouin de Bailleul Sgr Douxlieu. Il a épousé Isabeau de Ghistelles avant 1346, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Sohier de Bailleul Chevalier wurde, als Sohn von Baudouin de Bailleul Sgr Douxlieu geboren. Er hat vor 1346 in Europa Isabeau de Ghistelles geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Sohier de Bailleul Chevalier è nato il come figlio di Baudouin de Bailleul Sgr Douxlieu. Lui sposato Isabeau de Ghistelles prima del 1346, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Sohier de Bailleul ChevalierはBaudouin de Bailleul Sgr Douxlieuの息子として生まれた。1346年以前にヨーロッパでIsabeau de Ghistellesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Sohier de Bailleul Chevalier(은)는 Baudouin de Bailleul Sgr Douxlieu의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1346년 이전 우럽에서 Isabeau de Ghistelles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sohier de Bailleul Chevalier nasceu filho de Baudouin de Bailleul Sgr Douxlieu. Ele casou-se com Isabeau de Ghistelles antes 1346, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Sohier de Bailleul Chevalier родился. Его отца звали Baudouin de Bailleul Sgr Douxlieu. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabeau de Ghistelles перед 1346 г. в местности Европа. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Sohier de Bailleul Chevalier nació como hijo de Baudouin de Bailleul Sgr Douxlieu. Se casó con Isabeau de Ghistelles antes de 1346, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.
